title: Advanced Modeling Capstone and Reproducible Research · Stakeholder Model Mission
summary: An interdisciplinary technical review panel. The panel needs a novel, reproducible model with verification, validation, uncertainty, and an auditable release. Planned artifact: Deliver Reproducible Applied Mathematics Research Capstone with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Formulate research question in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Derive computational experiment in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Validate uncertainty communication in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-advanced cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

steps.title: Produce a checked model result
steps.instruction: A measured quantity starts at 19 units, changes by −6 units, then by +2 units. Calculate the final quantity.
steps.why: A numerical result is not complete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.

content.text: Preserve the signs and compute 19 − 6 + 2; compare with the starting scale.

content.title: Before calculating
content.text: Predict the sign and approximate magnitude. Enter the requested quantity with a unit, then compare it with that prediction.

hints: Preserve the signs and compute 19 − 6 + 2; compare with the starting scale.
Keep full working precision and round only the final reported value.
The accepted result is within 0.001 of the exact value and includes units.

steps.title: Encode a reproducible check
steps.instruction: Add a evidence_math_adv_reproducible_release_hfxb9n function that computes or traces the changed case, asserts one meaningful invariant, and returns inspectable evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Reproducible Release into observable performance evidence.

steps.title: Defend the stakeholder delivery
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Reproducible Release applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Communicate reproducible release in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
